scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core packages/sdk packages/cli packages/agenthub-example --pretty false
scripts.pack:dry-run: pnpm --filter @tokendance/code-core pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @tokendance/code-sdk pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @tokendance/code-cli pack --dry-run
scripts.pack:check: pnpm build && pnpm pack:dry-run && pnpm pack:smoke
scripts.release:next:check: pnpm contract:check && pnpm verify && pnpm pack:check
